notes.left_open_only: trajectory reaches target after at least one left-mouth corridor-to-outside exit and no membrane corridor-to-outside crossing
notes.mem_only: trajectory reaches target after at least one membrane corridor-to-outside crossing and no left-mouth corridor-to-outside exit
notes.both: trajectory uses both left-mouth and membrane corridor-to-outside exits before hitting the target
notes.none: trajectory hits the target without any corridor-to-outside exit of either type
